name: Atzengold "Kutscher" 5-Panel Cap
description: Black water-resistant organic canvas with custom gold stenciled "Atzengold" raw embroidery. Flat brim style.

name: Atzen-Shirt "Classic Gold"
description: 100% fine organic ring-spun combed cotton. High-comfort heavyweight streetwear fit featuring the iconic stenciled gold brand crest.

name: Atzen-Hoodie "Naturtrüb" (Oversized)
description: 450gsm heavyweight sand-washed organic cotton with original Berlin-Bavaria spray-stencil back print.

name: Bayerischer Steinkrug (0.5L)
description: Handcrafted grey stoneware beer mug which keeps Atzengold Kellerbier cold much longer than glass. Cobalt fired logo.

name: Atzen-Glas Goldrand Edition
description: Thin-walled elegant crystal lager glass with real fluid gold rim styling. Elevates yeast citrus aromas.
